zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeremiah Rollins於1675年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德索莫斯沃斯時，他的父親Ichabod Rawlins35歲，母親Mary Tibbetts17歲。他於1714年與Elizabeth Ham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1768年12月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德索莫斯沃斯享年93歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德洛林斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Rollins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Rolling , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rolling
meanings: English: variant of Rowland , with -ling substituted for -land.

English: habitational name from Rowling Court in Goodnestone (Kent) or Rowling Street in Bilsington (Kent). The origins of these placenames are uncertain, but they may both derive from an unattested Old English word related to an ancient Germanic base rull- ‘something round’ + the Old English placename forming suffix -ing.
English: from the rare Middle English personal name Ro(u)lin, a diminutive of either Roll (Rolf) or Rol(l)and. See Rolfe and Rowland .

nameMeanings.name: Jeremiah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘appointed by God’ in Hebrew; it was borne in the Bible by a Hebrew prophet of the 7th–6th centuries  bc , whose story, prophecies of judgement, and lamentations are recorded in the book of the Bible that bears his name. The Book of Lamentations is also attributed to him; it bewails the destruction of Jerusalem and the temple by the Babylonians in  587   bc . Despite (or because of) the gloomy subject matter of these texts, the name enjoyed some popularity among Puritans from the 16th century onwards and later Christian fundamentalists, partly perhaps because Jeremiah also preached reconciliation with God after his wrath was assuaged. Since the 1970s it has found considerable favour in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeremiah Rollins was born in 1675, in Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Ichabod Rawlins, was 35 and his mother, Mary Tibbetts, was 17. He married Elizabeth Ham in 1714, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 7 December 1768, in Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 93, and was buried in Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeremiah Rollins родился в 1675 г. в местности сомирсворт, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ichabod Rawlins было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Tibbetts, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ham в 1714 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 7 декабря 1768 г. в местности сомирсворт, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности роллинсфорд, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeremiah Rollins nació en 1675, en Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Ichabod Rawlins, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mary Tibbetts, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Ham en 1714, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1768, en Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
